community.name: DCAT3 - DCAT-US 3.0 Profile
community.description: Root community for the DCAT-US 3.0 application profile. Holds all DCAT3-prefixed domains, asset types, attribute types, relation types, complex relations, and statuses. Created by the dcat3-collibra-import tool.

domains.name: DCAT3 Catalog Domain
domains.description: Holds DCAT3 Catalog, Catalog Record, Dataset, Dataset Series, Distribution, Data Service assets.

domains.name: DCAT3 Reference Data Domain
domains.description: Holds DCAT3 Concept, Concept Scheme, Role, Media Type, Standard, Metric, and the controlled vocabularies DCAT-US mandates (themes, file formats, frequencies, licenses, access-rights, spatial areas, CUI categories, NARA restriction codes).

domains.name: DCAT3 Stakeholder Domain
domains.description: Holds DCAT3 Agent, Organization, Person, Contact assets.

domains.name: DCAT3 Governance Domain
domains.description: Holds DCAT3 Access Restriction, CUI Restriction, Use Restriction, Liability Statement, License Document, Rights Statement, Provenance Statement, Attribution, Activity, Quality Measurement, Checksum assets.

domains.name: DCAT3 Spatial/Temporal Domain
domains.description: Holds DCAT3 Location, Address (Location), Address (Contact Point), Geographic Bounding Box, Period of Time assets.
